Product:{\"sku\":\"127450-1\"}.description({\"html\":true}):
<p>This t-shirt features a large Super Mario™ 40th Anniversary logo on the chest with a smaller "Since 1985" design on the back just below the collar. A little retro and completely fun, grab yours while supplies last!</p>

<p><strong>Materials:</strong> 100% Cotton</p>

<p><strong>Care instructions</strong>: Hand or machine wash in cold water with like colors. Do not bleach. Tumble dry low. Do not iron decoration.</p>

Materials: 100% Cotton

Care instructions: Hand or machine wash in cold water with like colors. Do not bleach. Tumble dry low. Do not iron decoration.
